actions.reason: Useful contributor PR with a narrow correct owner surface, but it needs maintainer-safe branch repair rather than merge. Merge is disallowed by job frontmatter and merge preflight is incomplete.
Issue is covered by the canonical PR path but should not be closed in this execute run.
Allowed actions include fix and raise_pr; the safest path is to repair the contributor branch, preserving credit, instead of opening a replacement PR.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair contributor PR #80455 so the doctor clean no-write path only prints the --fix trailer when loadAndMaybeMigrateDoctorConfig recorded pending config changes. Keep the fix on the contributor branch if possible, remove the normal-PR CHANGELOG.md edit, preserve @KeWang0622 credit, and validate the focused doctor tests before any merge consideration.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(doctor): suppress --fix trailer when no pending config changes remain
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Summary:
- Repair #80455 by keeping the contributor's pendingChanges-based fix for #80435 on the doctor config/health path.
- Remove the normal-PR CHANGELOG.md edit and preserve release-note context in the PR body/squash message instead.
- Preserve credit for @KeWang0622 as the source PR author and @nonplace as the issue reporter.

Verification:
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts
- git diff --check

Refs: #80435, source PR #80455.
credit_notes: Contributor credit: @KeWang0622 / kewang-pika authored the original narrow fix for #80435.
Issue reporter credit: @nonplace reported the clean-state doctor trailer bug in #80435.
Do not keep the PR's CHANGELOG.md edit; capture user-facing release-note context in the repaired PR body or eventual squash message.
